meta.headline_sub: One operator, two peers, one shared brain spanning every repo in the org. Every claim, release, and recorded decision flowing through the memory + coordination mesh — so you can actually see it work.

funnel.d1: session outcomes mined into candidate knowledge
funnel.d2: passed the recall≥3 gate, promoted to team scope
funnel.d3: endorsed as universal, generalized, merged to knowledge

components.desc: SessionStart/SessionEnd hooks, installer, replay player and version nudges. Makes the memory discipline automatic in every Claude session — no willpower required.
Distills session outcomes into knowledge and promotes it team→org through endorsement + generalization gates. Solo-operator-is-org fast lane.
Records decisions, constraints and pipelines per project, with a Cloudflare Worker remote mirror (dual-write, newest-wins upsert). The canonical store.
Claim/release board with overlap CAS and a human-in-the-loop mailbox. Makes the phone a first-class peer alongside the desktop — no local clone.

events.t: Post-audit fixes: revert margin reward, repair the eval harness, build the escape hatch
events.desc: The stack routing three linked fixes through one claim — currently in progress.

decisions.t: Mirror propagates edits + deprecations both ways via remote upsert (newest-wins merge).
Flip context-keeper-remote to available:true + Bearer auth in the manifest.
Solo/team auto-detection with a solo fast-lane for org promotion; gate never relaxed.
record_decision accepts supersedes=[ids] — a distinct lifecycle from deprecated.
Hold off on embedding recall until the KB crosses ~100 items; keep the lexical scorer.
get_context returns no_confident_match below min_relevance instead of a false top hit.
Version signals shipped (PR #10); .context/ gitignored so memory never lands in the public repo.
Gate team→org on generalization — project-specific bodies refused unless restated.
Fixed the summary-truncation loop; added topic clustering + embedding backends.
Pivot from observation-feature interventions to structural action-mask interventions after both obs attempts failed head-to-head A/B vs the v2 baseline.
Auto-launch uses a tasklist process check + O_EXCL file lock to prevent a double-launch race; never trust a port check alone.
QLoRA fine-tune (clark-hermes3:ft) passes the eval gate vs base on every metric — but a live multi-turn smoke still surfaced numeric-fact hallucination + context loss.
Multi-resume variants with auto-selection by role_type from the parsed job description.
Use llama-cpp-python with GGUF files from HuggingFace instead of Ollama.
